page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a single thread per core allocation. The memory configuration consists of 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB per core. Local storage is bundled, featuring a 1919 GB SSD, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 5 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak category, which is also reflected in poor single-threaded gzip and bzip3 compression speeds. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. Memory bandwidth tests show average read and write speeds, though the overall Passmark memory score is weak.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and substantial 1919 GB local SSD storage, this instance offers a balanced resource profile for storage-intensive and database workloads. It achieves average performance in Redis SET operations and Passmark database operations. The server is well-suited for relational databases, NoSQL data stores, and general-purpose multi-threaded applications that benefit from local SSD storage, though it is less optimal for single-threaded compute-heavy tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.4xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show a contrast between weak single-core capabilities and average multi-core execution, with multi-threaded decompression, Redis SET operations, and database benchmarks all scoring in the middle tier. The local SSD storage and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy workloads. It is best suited for database hosting, multi-threaded application servers, and general-purpose workloads requiring high-capacity local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.4xlarge is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 1919 GB local SSD, delivering average multi-core performance for database and storage workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 1919 GB local SSD for database and storage workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring high-capacity local SSD storage and balanced memory for database and general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Average multi-core and database benchmark performance
Best suited for database hosting and storage-intensive applications
